articles.title: The Hollywood Reporter Correctly Predicted Taylor Swift’s Wedding Gown (But Adam Sandler Caught Us Napping) - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: Swift and Travis Kelce both wore Christian Dior by Jonathan Anderson for their Madison Square Garden wedding, confirming THR’s couture call. The officiant, however, was a surprise.
articles.content: There were many — many — predictions about which luxe label Taylor Swift would choose when she married Travis Kelce on July 3. She wore a striped Ralph Lauren dress for her engagement photos. She has… [+4273 chars]

articles.title: Beyoncé Releases New Song ‘Morning Dew (Donk)’ As Fourth Of July Surprise - Deadline
articles.description: Beyoncé is setting off some Independence Day fireworks of her own, releasing a new song called "Morning Dew (Donk)" as a surprise 4th of July gift to fans.
